---
title: "Using R for reproductible data management and analyses in Forest Sciences"
subtitle: "PPG Ciências florestais - Universidade de Brasilia"
author: Géraldine Derroire
institute: Cirad - UnB
---

This is the course material for the module *Using R for reproducible data management and analyses in Forest Sciences* of the Univerity of Brasilia - Post-graduate program in Forest Sciences, delivered by Géraldine Derroire (Cirad-University of Brasilia).

Course syllabus in English is [here](EFL360457_R_for_Forest_Sciences_2025.pdf), and in Portuguese [here](EFL360457_R_para_Ciencias_Florestais_2025.pdf).

The course material has been created using quarto and R version 4.4.3.

-   [Course introduction](0_course_introduction/index.html)

-   [Set up the working environment](0_installing_enviro/index.html)

-   [Principles of reproductible science](1_reproducible_science/index.html)

-   [Getting started with R](2_getting_started/index.html)

    -   [Exercices on session 2/3](2_getting_started/exo_session_3.pdf)

    -   [Exercices on session 3/3](2_getting_started/exo_session_4.pdf)

-   [Working with data](3_manip_data/index.html)

    -   [Exercices](3_manip_data/exo_session_5.pdf)

-   [Introduction to the tidyverse](4_tidyverse/index.html)

    -   [Exercice on session 1/2](4_tidyverse/exo_session_6.pdf)

    -   [Exercices on session 2/2](4_tidyverse/exo_session_7.pdf)

-   [Data visualisation with ggplot](5_graph/index.html)

    -   [Exercices](5_graph/exo_session_8.pdf)

-   Statistics with R

    -   [Statistics with R session 1/3](6_basic_statistics/basic_stats_session1.html)

        -   [Exercices on session 1/3](6_basic_statistics/exo_session9.pdf)

    -   [Statistics with R session 2/3](6_basic_statistics/basic_stats_session2.html)

        -   [Exercices on session 2/3](6_basic_statistics/exo_session10.pdf)

    -   [Statistics with R session 3/3](6_basic_statistics/basic_stats_session3.html)

        -   [Exercices on session 3/3](6_basic_statistics/exo_session11.pdf)

-   Going further with R

    -   [Going further with R session 1/2](7_going_further/going_further_session1.html)

    -   [Going further with R session 2/2](7_going_further/going_further_session2.html)

    -   [Exercices](7_going_further/exo_session12_13.pdf)

-   [Introduction to Version Control with Git and GitHub](8_version_control/version_control.html)

-   [Literate programming with quarto](9_literate_programming/literate_programming.html)
